_style: 儿童 App UI 素材, painterly children book illustration, 温暖配色（赭石、琥珀、柔和粉橙）, 柔和阴影, ⚠️纯白色背景 pure white background, 居中构图, 单一动作场景, 正方形, 无任何文字

chunks.subject: a cartoon girl piglet pointing to herself with one hand on chest, other hand waving hello, friendly self-introducing pose
a cartoon piglet extending one arm to the side gesturing toward another character, presentation pose, smiling, the introduced character is shown next to it
a small piglet with apologetic expression looking up at a larger mother pig figure, hands clasped, head slightly bowed
two excited piglets running toward a father pig with arms raised, shouting joyfully, motion lines
several brown muddy water puddles on green grass ground, glossy surface reflecting light, multiple sizes
a happy cartoon piglet mid-air jumping straight down into the center of a muddy brown puddle, big brown water splashes flying outward, motion lines
a piglet shown in three poses arranged vertically — jumping up, at peak, and landing down — on a brown puddle, spring-like motion lines on both sides
a piglet leaping with a large arrow curving from outside into the center of a big brown puddle, the arrow is the focus, dynamic motion
a pair of small piglet feet putting on bright yellow rain boots, the boots are halfway on, focus on the action of pulling them up
an older sister piglet holding the hand of a smaller younger piglet protectively, walking together, caring expression
a cartoon pig pointing at a chaotic muddy room with disapproving expression, finger pointing toward the dirt, eyes wide
a friendly father pig giving a big thumbs up with a wide smile, sparkles around the thumb, agreeable mood
a piglet waving and beckoning to a smaller piglet with one arm, looking back over shoulder while walking forward, follow-me gesture
two small piglets running away into the distance with their backs to viewer, shrinking in size, a waving father pig watching them go
a cartoon father pig with one hand on chin, eyes looking up, a glowing thought bubble with a question mark above the head
a cartoon piglet with hands behind back hiding a surprise, mischievous smile, a giant question mark floating above the head
a cartoon father pig with one finger pointing up, a bright glowing yellow lightbulb above the head, knowing smile, eyes confident
a father pig with hands on cheeks in dramatic surprise, mouth open wide, looking at two small piglets completely covered in brown mud, both piglets grinning innocently
a group of three piglets standing together with one hand raised forward in unified gesture, ready-to-go pose, sparkles of excitement around them
a cartoon piglet shrugging with both palms up, casual expression, a small brown mud puddle next to it labeled as harmless, downplay gesture
a cartoon piglet with index finger raised in a serious 'must do' gesture, holding a magnifying glass examining a puddle carefully, focused expression
a sad piglet looking out a rainy window from inside, raindrops on glass, a red prohibition sign in the corner, pleading eyes
two piglets quickly scrubbing the floor clean with mops, one looking nervously over shoulder at a closed door, hourglass with falling sand in upper corner indicating time pressure
two piglets sitting on a couch from behind, facing a glowing vintage television with a colorful cartoon scene playing, eyes fixed on screen

two muddy piglets standing side by side proudly, both pointing at themselves with both thumbs, surrounded by a swirling motion-trail of muddy puddle splashes behind them, telling-a-recent-adventure pose
a daddy pig pointing inquisitively at his child piglet, with a small floating thought bubble showing a steamy bathtub, asking-a-question pose, gentle suspicious smile

a mummy pig with hands on hips looking at her muddy daughter piglet who is covered head-to-toe in brown mud splashes, the daughter shrugging sheepishly, a yellow caution arrow pointing at the muddy mess
a daddy pig leaning forward with one eyebrow raised, pointing a curious finger at two piglets, a question mark above his head, classic 'tell me what you did' parent-asking-child pose
